hotel_name: Rome Cavalieri, A Waldorf Astoria Hotel

reviews.title: Fantastic for the first stay
reviews.positives: the view, location and the shuttle service to town

reviews.title: We paid for our experience- not to come there any time more
reviews.positives: Only the view
reviews.negatives: All rest - kitchen - awful/ personal slow and lazy / there was a bug in our room and we were obliged to change it / the water is not coming inside the bathroom when you take the shower / everything is old and not worth this money at all - non recommended

reviews.title: spooky
reviews.text: at the first night, i awake at 3 am. then i was trying to sleep and the bed was shaking by itself. the day after i told the hotel staff and they act like nothing happen.

reviews.title: Not impressed
reviews.positives: Staff friendliness

reviews.title: Disappointing due to a number of key facilities being withdrawn due to a very large corporate event being hosted the ful
reviews.positives: The location and the grounds were lovely and also located at the property is the amazing 3 star Michelin restaurant La Pergola
reviews.negatives:
Many of the facilities were not available to us during our stay as the hotel had almost, but not quite entirely, been taken over by a large corporate event whose people were loud, louche and at times bordering on obscene in their behaviour 
No access to the main pool, the breakfast and restaurant terrace and on the final day no access to the one remaining outdoor terrace 
Bar area unusable due to the behaviour mentioned above 
In fairness the hotel acknowledged the problem and agreed in future that they should notify guests in advance if facilities are being withdrawn, they also compensated us for the lack of facilities with a partial refund 
It rather spoilt our trip but hopefully lessons will be learned for the future because it is a lovely hotel in a super location

reviews.title: bad location but provides shuttle bus to town
reviews.text: Expected alot but very disappointed when compared with waldorf shanghai. It beats the rome branch 10 times!
reviews.positives: quiet at night, good customer service and nice spa

reviews.title: Simply disaster
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Awful. Old Rooms, old facilities. Gym in basement without window. Nothing was positive

reviews.title: Dated resort far outside of Rome
reviews.text: Our stay was disappointing.  Internet service was very expensive add on. Food at restaurant was mediocre and outrageously expensive. Everything at this Hotel was $$$$$, but what you got did not reflect the cost.
reviews.positives: Room was large and bathroom upscale, pool was impressive, staff freindly

reviews.title: Not the Waldorf standard you expect
reviews.text: After having our expectations of the Waldorf set quite high in Dubai. Rome Cavalieri is let down by a location that is quite far from town and exorbitant pricing for food and drinks. At checkout we noticed almost everyone questioning overcharges. I also had to get a refund on room rate and requests mini bar refunds for items we never touched. The complimentary shuttle bus is definitely good.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel but definitely overrated
reviews.text:
The Cavalieri is a beautiful hotel and the rooms are extremely spacious and the interiors are impressive and almost majestic!
HOWEVER, the hotel is quite far away from the city centre and on a hill top so its not easy to walk around. Considering it is a very expensive 5-star hotel, I was also really disappointed with the fact that everything came at a sur-charge. We did not even receive more than 2 small 150ml bottles of water per day (one of which was sparkling). You have to pay to use the gym/spa as well. 
The breakfast was tiny and the hot food was cold. Again, really not the standard of buffet that I would expect from a 5-star establishment.
In short, very beautfiul but also quite disappointing especially as the pricing sets your expectations high.
reviews.positives: Beautiful interior, away from the hustle and bustle and spacious rooms

reviews.title: Roman Invasion
reviews.text:
We chose this hotel as we had to stay for 3 days in the heat of the summer for a birthday party in Rome.
We were looking forward to cooling off in one of the he hotel's various pools, much to our disappointment the whole of Rome were all over the pool area and families with small children in the main pool. Just impossible to do any laps or spend a quiet time buy the pool area, as it is simply overcrowded.I have never seen anything like this.  The management sells day passes disregardless of the hotel's occupancy.
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM WITH PRIVATE PARK VIEW

reviews.title: Nice hotel specially the breakfast
reviews.text:
I was expecting a bit more. The attention to the details for example.
Concierge is very professional.
The room was not exactly as per the picture from agoda 
Restaurant need 1 week reservation from before (pergola) it does not make any sense to the tourist
No grocery shop sells water or anything else
The hertz rent a car was not helpful and I got it from online directly from the hertz for half the price
reviews.positives: Breakfast  lobby and free shuttle to the main attraction

reviews.title: Great hotel, the location is scenic
reviews.text: This hotel is very cheap in nature, they charge 10 Euro to use the gym, 18 euro for having a sun bed by the pool, and 27 euro for internet access.  In most 5 star hotels these services are included but this hotel acts like a EasyHotel chain charging you extra at every turn.  Very low class if you ask me.  Charge a higher price (although its one of the most expensive hotels anyway) but include the basic services.
reviews.positives: Nice hotel

reviews.title: Couple on holiday
reviews.text: Highly enjoyable despite distance from Rome attractions
reviews.positives: Friendly service, great pool and good variety in food menu

reviews.title: Great Hotel, loved it..
reviews.text:
The place was wonderful while it is a little outside of the city, so you take a shuttle in and leave all the stress behind when you get back to your hotel. It was nice to have the peace after the rush!
The only thing that was an issue is the bathroom always had a funk in the air. For what we paid I would have thought this would be a little more sanitary... but for a weekend we held out.
reviews.positives: The pool and the area is very quaint...

reviews.title: Disappointing for a a top end expensive hotel
reviews.positives: Beautiful gardens and lobby
reviews.negatives:
They gave us room right next to loudest lift doors and chimes I have ever heard and we had a struggle to get another room
No tea or coffee making in room
Bath and shower wouldn’t empty 
TV turned itself on and off all night
Much further from tourist attractions than we thought 
Expensive top quality hotel should do better than this didn’t let it spoil our joint birthday which they knew about and we didn’t even get a happy birthday from them

reviews.title: Great Hotel and marvelous location
reviews.text: It was a great time. Hotel/Room was great, but room service and house keeping didn't match at all the classification and price o the hotel.
reviews.positives: Location

reviews.title: Honeymoon hotel stay
reviews.text: The location was somewhat ambiguous, and we stayed there on the last day of our honeymoon. Even though it was called a honeymoon, there wasn't anything particularly special about it. The hotel shuttle bus went to the center of Rome, which allowed us to make good use of our free time. The hotel itself had a really elegant and classic feel, almost like a museum of Rome. The breakfast was ordinary. We used the swimming pool, but I strongly felt that the staff member who assigned the sunbed spots was deliberately trying to place us, as Asians, in the corner. Even though all the spots in the middle were empty, they suggested the corner spot three times. The attitude was friendly, but I could see that there was an intent behind it. After that, we kept an eye on it, and they never recommended the corner spot to any westerners. I felt a bit uncomfortable about that. Other than this, everything else was a very good experience.

reviews.title: Lovely room with view of Rome from uphill
reviews.text: They do have a shuttle bus to the city centre. This is very good because taxis in Rome can be very expensive. The rooms are comfortable and their bathrooms are large and nice. It's nice to come back to a cozy room after a long day in Rome
reviews.positives: Classy

reviews.title: Nice view and good locations
reviews.positives: Nice staff, helpful, and good locations

reviews.title: Very pleasant, a beautiful place
reviews.text: We stayed in Rome Cavelieri twice and each time, it was a very pleasant stay. Check-in can be quite lengthy, the wait for the concierge can also take a while, but in general service was good. There is no free wi-fi in the hotel lobby or rooms. The charges for in-room wifi were exorbitant, that's one big downside for this hotel. The hotel is tucked away from the hustle and bustle of the city, there are no attraction sites within walking distance, that said, there's a complimentary bus shuttle for guests to the city. The rooms are generally clean, HOWEVER, the bathroom sometimes smell of pee...
reviews.positives: Gorgeous antiques and artwork, lovely garden and pool, wonderful patio dining area

reviews.title: Luxury with good service
reviews.text: Very nice overall.  The only thing that was disappointing for me was the spa.  It is apparently award winning.  I have been to six spas in a range of locations this year - every single one of them had better amenities such as snacks and beverages, toiletries for guests to use that I am shocked that they are considered a superior spa.  The treatment in any event was lovely.
reviews.positives: Imperial Lounge, Nice Staff, Luxury Surroundings

reviews.title: Absolutely gorgeous hotel!
reviews.text:
As soon as we entered the reception area, the grandeur of the hotel immediately impresses us. The way the hotel is decorated with sculptures and art is just amazing.

Our room was huge. Felt like a Cali-king size bed, separate living room, massive bathroom and a balcony with a city view.

If you walk out of the hotel and turn right (about 5mins walk) you'll find some very nice local cafes and restaurants (pity we did not realised till the last 2 days of our stay).

Everything about this hotel makes you feel 5 stars...

Here are the CONS;
1. Hotel is quite far from the main city attractions.
2. Free shuttle bus accomodates about 28 seating and 12-16 standing (not always allowed). And this only runs once every hour.
reviews.positives: Excellent price for a 5 star hotel

reviews.title: Snobbish staff at reception – but not in lounge
reviews.text: The reception was snobbish and unhelpful – otherwise I love the hotel, the lounge, the view and the pool.
reviews.positives: The view, the pool and the room/bed

reviews.title: Breakfast was impressive, but dinner was not.
reviews.text:
Although this hotel was a bit out of town central, the breakfast was worth the additional shuttle. We also love the pools.
We had dinner in L'Uliveto - the experience totally blew me up. The manager spoke fluent english, but not the other staff. Apparently this restaurant was a hot spot for Roman birthday celebrations. The manager was quite busy with the local guests so he sent a junior girl who did not understand a word of English to serve our table. Needless to say, service was terribly slow. Multiple and repeated mistakes occurred and it was close to impossible to clarify with our waitress. Food was not too bad. For the prices they charge, the service was sub-sub-standard.
reviews.positives: Great breakfast and nice pools

reviews.title: it was fantastic the for the first stay
reviews.positives: the view, location and the shuttle service

reviews.title: very nice hotel, professional staff...
reviews.text: overlooking the panorama that has inspired visitors for centuries is rome's most prestigious address – the rome cavalieri hotel. though only minutes from the city's great monuments, the rome cavalieri has the tranquility of an oasis. enclosed in fifteen acres of lush mediterranean parklands, this luxury hotel in rome is a calm retreat in the heart of the eternal city, an elegant refuge where time slows and hearts quicken.
reviews.positives: actually like location, food

reviews.title: Romantic stay for engagement
reviews.text: The stay was very nice. We had a room with garden view. We were offered a room with city view which was great but the price difference was almost double. Each room looks great, the art work in the halls also makes a good impression. It was a very nice stay! Food was awesome!
reviews.positives: Hotel,Food,Art

reviews.title: Icing on cake.
reviews.text: Excellent.
reviews.positives: Good size rooms. Great spa, where we want to return again and again.

reviews.title: outside the rome downtown. free shuttle to city
reviews.text: It's a 5 stars Astoria Waldorf with the historical classic feel. The hotel is not as new as some other choices but the service is unbeatable.
reviews.positives: Luxury. Spa. Historical

reviews.title: not as great as the first stay
reviews.text: asked the hotel to change my reservation and was given the ok but had to clear it with agoda and i did that and was given the ok by both and at the last minute was told that i could not change my reservation and my original booking was not even given to me correctly. if you book a rome view room make sure that its not on the 3rd floor couse you will end up paying the extra for a tree view room. What a way to end your vacation with such a disappointment.
reviews.positives: view location and the shuttle service

reviews.title: disappointed with the mess up that happened
reviews.text: asked the hotel to change my reservation and was given the ok but had to clear it with agoda and i did that and was given the ok by both and at the last minute was told that i could not change my reservation and my original booking was not even given to me correctly. if you book a rome view room make sure that its not on the 3rd floor couse you will end up paying the extra for a tree view room. What a way to end your vacation with such a disappointment.
reviews.positives: not as great as my first visit here

reviews.title: Luxury Hotel but incredibly expensive!
reviews.text: Without doubt this is a luxury hotel, where your every need can and will be met by the very attentive, professional staff particularly Doormen and Concierge team. The Spa is one of the best I have experienced in the World and I am very well travelled.  The ambience in the very large lobby bar is so very relaxing and refined.  The large comfortable lounge chairs and the beautiful paintings on displays really create an absolute feeling of finery and luxury. The presentation of afternoon tea, cocktails and coffee was always more than expected.  The restaurant on the lower floor is incredible.  The waiters level of service was flawless and I had one of the most wonderful meals with my family, made even more enjoyable by their clear enjoyment of my childrens presence without this ever become obtrusive in anyway.  The meals was also fantastic but the level of service was by far the best experience of eating in this restaurant.  Overall our hotel stay was so very enjoyable and comfortable with everything being done to a very high standard as one would expect of a top class hotel. My only suggestion for improvement would be that breakfast needs improving as the hot food was often cold and always running out and the room service dinner we order which came to approx £200 for 6 of us was quite frankly cold and when I raised this with them on arrival they did not seem to appreciate this was so and kept reassuring me that the plate underneath would keep the food hot and well this was not the case.  I would strongly recommend that breakfast is eaten out and room service is not taken as both will be dissapointing in comparison to the rest of the hotel experiences.
reviews.positives: Amazing Spa & gym facilities. Wonderful bar and lounge area, excellent service levels in the main....

reviews.title: One of the coolest hotels i've ever been to
reviews.text: The only cons I would have to say is that there is no free wi-fi. However, the concierge more than makes up for it if you have any questions act your stay.
reviews.positives: You really feel like Roman royalty - the staff is very attentive and nice, the architecture is drop dead gorgeous, the garden is beautiful, you have TONS of facilities and the shuttle makes it very convenient to go back and forth from the city.

reviews.title: Superior hotel but far out from centre Rome
reviews.text: The hotel is fantastic. Could not fault it on anything except that it is far from the main attractions of Rome. Even though they provide a free shuttle close to top of Spanish steps it is only every hour which means you havevto time your day based on the shuttle.
reviews.positives: Absolute luxury and well priced

reviews.title: Old, boring, far from center and not worth the cost.
reviews.positives: Nothing special.
reviews.negatives:
Entering the hotel felt like I took a Time Machine back to the early 2000s. Everything in the accommodation is old and dated from physical things like furniture and telephones to the experience over all service style. For the night cost I was expecting something completely different. I had to check out early because I was bit by all the bugs in the balcony, bring a repellent if you’re staying in the summer. 

One of the receptionists was extremely rude, my booking was for 2 people and she, very rudely and condescendingly, me told me I need to pay extra for my friend to come in and hang out. Thankfully Booking.com was on my side and that was resolved. But that type of service for the cost does not make sense. 

Also, boring pool and the Rome views are blocked by large trees.

reviews.title: Great Staff, good and clean facilities
reviews.text:
The hotel was great, the staff excellent but room service had a very limited menu. 
However, one doesn’t go to Rome to eat inside one’s room. So, I would definitely recommend the hotel.
reviews.room_type: 2 Twin Bed Deluxe Room With Private Park View

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text:
Magnificent hotel just outside of the main centre of Rome. The hotel is immaculate, the rooms amazing, the pool and grounds sensational. The only negative is there are not many good external dining options in the surrounding neighbourhood or in close proximity.
I would definitely stay at this hotel again and recommend as one of the top hotels in Rome.

reviews.title: very comfortable stay
reviews.text: its a pleasant stay although very far from tourist area (closest will be the Vatican) which can be reach in 15 minutes by a cab. we are used to centrally located hotel in rome cavalieri is not as what we expect. but all and all its a very luxurious hotel. cant believe I'll get to stay in a large room in Italy.
reviews.positives: luxurious, very comfortable, all in one hotel

reviews.title: Great room but expensive
reviews.text: Everything was good (room, breakfast, shuttle) but prices are high.
reviews.positives: Clean& big room with fine buffet breakfast

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel
reviews.text: Fantastic place to wrap up after a very busy travel schedule around the amazing country that is Italy. Luxurious facilities and incredibly nice accommodations were exactly what we needed before heading home.

reviews.title: Special Vacation in Rome
reviews.text: My stay was fantastic, and the hotel's décor are stunning. Special thanks to Mr. Haitham, who handled our check-in efficiently.
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM WITH PRIVATE PARK VIEW

reviews.title: Peace of mind
reviews.text: Although it is a bit far from the center, it is rather reassuring. The staff are reliable and there are no problems. The gym has facilities comparable to high-end facilities in Japan, making it perfect for long-term stays.

reviews.title: world-class hotel no doubt
reviews.text: love the fact that they have in-house hair salon. a bit far from the city, but therefore it has great view.
reviews.room_type: King Premium Room With Rome View

reviews.title: We had an amazing time at the Waldorf Astoria in Rome
reviews.text: Excellent service, excellent pool, excellent breakfast!  My 11 year old son and I stayed there for 3 days on a recent trip to Rome and while it was a bit out of town they had a beautiful and reliable shuttle service that dropped us off right in the center of Rome.   We left the hotel for the remaining 7 days to stay more central in Rome and immediately found ourselves missing the quiet of the Waldorf.  The staff was incredibly accommodating when we first arrived and helped us to check into our room early as we had been traveling for 10 hours.  We will definitely stay again the next time we visit Roma!
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM WITH PRIVATE PARK VIEW

reviews.title: Nice cozy place
reviews.text: Very nice hotel with the vintage paintings and very comfy.
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM WITH PRIVATE PARK VIEW

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: excellent we did enjoy every thing with friendly staff and good location as well all services are available we would recommend this stylish hotel to all friends
reviews.positives: clean , quiet and friendly

reviews.title: Amazing! And incredible value for money!
reviews.text: Throughly enjoyed our stay. Everything you would rate in a hotel was to the best possible standard from the comfort of the room to the beauty of your surrounding to the friendliness and willingness to help of the staff! Everyone was eager to help with a smile. Rooms were the best by far I've stayed in, and I've stayed in a few hotels in my life may I add. Definitely 5 star standards! Only downside is the location as everyone will have mentioned. It's a bit far out from the city but shuttle bus service provided however it does mean that if you fancy going back to your hotel for a quick afternoon rest if you're in central Rome this might not be possible. Special mention of the shuttle bus driver he was the sweetest man who was always happy and smiling and gave us a mini tour of rome as he drove us to the city. Can't say enough about this hotel! Clearly a happy customer.
reviews.positives: Comfort, staff friendliness, classy hotel

reviews.title: A luxurious romp in Rome
reviews.text: This hotel catered for our every desire,  from the moment we arrived until check out.  Everything was of the highest quality. The breakfast selection was extensive and of the highest quality.  The fitness center had more facilities than sine private gyms and the spa provided is with a lovely evening of relaxation.  The only downside was the location meant having to wait for the hourly shuttle or a 20 Euro cab to  get to and from the center of Rome. On yep evenings we were too tired to venture or for dinner given the trek required,  however the restaurant in the hotel was just lovely.
reviews.positives: Service, comfort and quality

reviews.title: Wonderful hotel, great service & very comfy beds
reviews.text: The Cavalieri is a great hotel, a little out of the centre but the shuttle bus makes up for this. The staff are very attentive and the pillow menu in the rooms is amazing!
reviews.positives: Pillow menu, shuttle bus into central Rome, quiet location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent intercontinental hotel. Clean, great spa and extremely kind and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Excellent services
reviews.text: We had a comfortable and enjoyable stay. I was with my teen boy and amenities were excellent

reviews.title: Excellent. And value for money
reviews.text: Excellence and very recommended which value for money
reviews.positives: Good spa, big room and very comftable bed

reviews.title: Gorgeous!
reviews.text: Beautiful Hotel with great staff. I really want to come back for vacation.
reviews.positives: Quality Service, Great Atmosphere, and Comfort Accomodation

reviews.title: Hotel with a view!
reviews.text: Excellent hotel with spacious rooms. One can see the whole Rome from the room. Breakfast is fab!
reviews.room_type: KING DELUXE ROOM WITH PRIVATE PARK VIEW

reviews.title: Wonderful Stat
reviews.text: Good breakfast. Transportation to city is free and making it convenience. Bus transport is clean. Everything is so amazing. Will stay again in the future 😊

reviews.title: Honeymoon
reviews.text: The Cavalier Hotel we chose for our honeymoon was better than we expected, and the front desk staff was incredibly friendly. We also used the Imperial Club, which I would highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: King Premium Room With Rome View

reviews.title: Magnifico 👌
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Waldorf Astoria Hotel in Rome, and I must say it was truly a unique and wonderful experience. From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm hospitality and impeccable service.

The hotel itself is a work of art, with its stunning architecture and luxurious interiors. Every detail, from the elegant furnishings to the beautiful artwork, exudes elegance and sophistication. It truly feels like stepping into a different era.

But what made our stay even more exceptional was the marvellous assistant, Francesca. She went above and beyond to ensure that every aspect of our stay was perfect. I can't thank Francesca enough for the personalised care she provided.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: We enjoyed this hotel so much, will definitely return

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
There’s no word, beautiful place, amazing staff, I completely recommend this place, I want to say thank you for the person who checked me in, very professional, I can’t wait to go back 
Thank you again for everyone to make this stay unforgettable

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: every thing was excellent more than expected
reviews.positives: quiet , clean, friendly

reviews.title: Simply wow
reviews.text: this is my second visit to this hotel and they just keep getting better it might not be the best location in rome as it is a bit far from city centre but for me it is the best hotel u could stay in.
reviews.positives: the view, staff performance and the size of the rooms

reviews.title: Brilliant welcome
reviews.text: Then welcome from the two prettiest girls on reception was awesome. The breakfast stupendous. The hotel full of style. Out of this world. Magical.
reviews.positives: The ambiance; the style; the welcome

reviews.title: Absolutely amazing!
reviews.text: One of the best hotels I've ever stayed at! The staff are friendly and efficient, and the rooms are so comfortable...we had one with an amazing view over Rome. The hotel isn't in the city centre but they provide a free shuttle service to get you there and back.
reviews.positives: Friendly and efficient staff, comfortable rooms, wonderful food

reviews.title: Truly the Best Hotel I stayed in 30 years you do n
reviews.text: As a family they treated us as royalty The Manager was so helpful as we were 4 persons so he arranged another room at a discount Free Wi Fi The Pool indoor outdoor fantastic % star experience Well Done to the Hotel and its staff
reviews.positives: Comfort Prestige Quality

reviews.title: Rome Cavalieri
reviews.text: Lovely hotel and service with a smile or Great location but small rooms

reviews.title: Very lovely hotel, treated guest like royalties
reviews.text: Very nice and attentive staffs. The breakfast was full of delicious foods.  Even those with very strict diet can fine the food that suits for them
reviews.positives: Location up on the hill very nice view of Rome.

reviews.title: great experience in rome
reviews.text:
when i stay in this hotel, it wasn't hot or cold.
but i've remember of experience last year in rome.
(if i stay in summer, suttle is excellent service to me.)

i'd visited vatican museum(only 10 euro by taxi), and etc.

also hotels service is fantastic.
reviews.positives: excellent location and suttle service

reviews.title: Great hotel with marvelous view
reviews.text:
situated on a hill, that hotel gives a great view to the city.
the breafast buffed was served with a big range of fresh products
reviews.positives: great rooms

reviews.title: Insgesamt ganz gut wegen den ermäßigte Preis
reviews.text: Der ermäßigter Preis- ganz gut; der voller Preis von 500€/Nacht etwas überzogen
reviews.positives: Service, Zimmer

reviews.title: wu derbares Hotel im Grüm
reviews.positives: Mitarbeiter Rezeption , Zimmer , Frühstück

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Alles bestens!

reviews.title: Traumhaft
reviews.text: Einfach Klasse... Das Hotel braucht leichte Renovierungen, der Rest aber ist wunderbar.
reviews.positives: - die Frau Pacifico von der Rezeption hat sich sehr bemüht unsere Ansprüche zu erledigen. Die Imperial Etage ist wirklich ausgezeichnet, man hat auch Essen und Getränke im Lounge.

reviews.title: Einfach nur schön!
reviews.text: Ein fantastisches Hotel in sehr schöner Anlage mit atemberaubender Aussicht über die Stadt.
reviews.room_type: King Premium Room With Rome View

reviews.title: 5 stelle All Excluded
reviews.text: L'hotel Rome Cavalieri ha 50 anni, e li dimostra, specialmente all'esterno dove parte del rivestimento si è sgretolato, all'interno, a parte i dipinti originali (Un Tiepolo troneggia nella hall) denota un gusto datato, che non incontra i miei gusti, ma sicuramente il genere ha i propri estimatori. l'accoglienza è comunque all'altezza del nome, la colazione è eccezionale con un' area prodotti biologici decisamente fornita, purtroppo girando il mondo ogni mese per affari è la prima volta che mi succede di dover pagare un extra  per la palestra, per il lettino in piscina, per la SPA, Sauna / bagno turco,  per WiFI. e non sono prezzi popolari due lettini bordo piscina sono 36 euro. una navetta puntuale e gratuita collega ogni mezzora l'hotel al centro di Roma, attenti ai taxi, siete fuori Roma e i prezzi lievitano se andate in aeroporto a Fiumicino.
reviews.positives: colazione,vista,camera

reviews.title: Hotel stupendo
reviews.text:
Nulla da dire sul soggiorno.
Hotel completo di qualsiasi comfort anche se è un bel pò decentrato dal centro.
Per prenotare la colazione mi sembra troppo complicato...compilare un modulo cartaceo alle 24:30 per avere la colazione in camera la mattina mi sembra esagerato, quando basterebbe ordinare quello che uno vuole, anche perchè chiedono ben 35,00 euro a persona!
reviews.positives: Confortevole

reviews.title: fantastico
reviews.text:
hotel di lusso che soddisfa tuute le richieste della clientela. eccezionale la SPA con piscina interna ed esterna; ristorante all'ultimo piano giudicato il n. 1 a Roma. Ottimo servizio navetta gratuito per il centro di Roma. 
Ci ritorneremo sicuramente
reviews.positives: SPA, Colazione, Ristorante La Pergola

reviews.title: ottimo
reviews.positives: tutto
reviews.negatives: nulla

reviews.title: 可もなく不可もなく
reviews.text:
ロケーションはあまりよくないです。
どこに行くにも少し離れていて、やや不便でした
ホテルから無料のバスが出ていますが本数はあまり多くないです。スタッフの方はとても感じがよく部屋も綺麗でした
reviews.room_type: 2 TWIN BED PREMIUM ROOM WITH ROME VIEW

reviews.title: Elegant hotel in past now very dated and way too expensive
reviews.positives:
The amenities of the spa and pool
Restaurant outstanding
reviews.negatives:
Too far away from everything 
Very dated hotel and overpriced 
Spa desk staff not very welcoming gave no orientation as to how to see the amenities and their location you were left on your own to wander around and find out  ie where the sauna was or 
Steam room or jazuzzi!

reviews.title: โรงแรมสวย หรู บริการเป็นเลิศ สมแล้วที่ได้ 5ดาว
reviews.text: บริการเหนือระดับ วิวห้องพักมองเห็นโรมทั้งเมือง ทุกอย่างหรูหรา สวยงาม คลาสิค สามารถใช้ชีวิตในโรงแรมได้ทั้งวัน ราคาคุ้มค่ามาก
reviews.positives: บริการดีมากเกินความคาดหวัง ห้องพักใหญ่อุปกรณ์ครบ มีรถ shutter bus คอยรับส่ง

reviews.title: Not worth the value for money- not 5 stars standard
reviews.positives: The facility was big and situated on a hill so we had the view of the city, has a beautiful garden surrounding the facility. I booked a suite that came with a sofa bed for my daughter so the space was adequate, the bathroom and toiletries were amazing and well designed. The decor is what was expected of a 5 star, the staff were ok except in the Resturant serving daily breakfast buffet the food was amazing and the selection was fantastic, the Resturant staff were very welcoming and caring.
reviews.negatives: The furniture is a bit worn out and old, the reception staff were not the friendliest , the location is bad and despite being far from the city and having literally abundance of parking on hotel grounds they wanted to charge us 35 Euros per night despite being guests in the hotel. Didn’t really like that and I think parking should be complementary for guests in the hotel just like other 5 star hotel chains, especially being at that location where it’s not close to the heart of the city.

reviews.title: 值得拥有
reviews.text: 位于山顶上，大厅富丽堂皇，房间干净舒适，洗漱用品是菲拉格慕系列，很多细节服务都做得很到位，酒店的欧陆式早餐算不上经验，但是对得起25欧（希尔顿会员价）的价格；晚餐在室外可以听现场钢琴音乐伴奏，小台灯倒映在泳池中，很有气氛。整体来说还不错，订得越早越便宜。

reviews.title: 좋았어요!
reviews.text: 허니문 마지막으로 숙박했는데 일단 힐튼이라 시설 너무좋았고 서비스도 좋았습니다. 위치가 조금 시내와 떨어져있어 아쉽긴했지만 만족합니다!

reviews.title: 완전 만족!
reviews.text:
신혼여행 마지막 숙박장소로 결정하여 1박 숙박하였음. 서비스, 직원의 친절도, 룸컨디션 모두 만족하였고 룸서비스 이용 시 가격대비 음식 및 서비스 완전 만족! 자체 셔틀버스를 운영하여 로마 시내까지 나오는데 불편하지 않았으며 이동 시 버스기사가 유명한 관광지 및 박물관등을 설명해줌(물론 영어로...) 조식 또한 5성급 호텔 답게 종류도 많았으며 직원의 서비스 친절도 또한 완전 만족. 다만 로마여행이 처음이라면 호텔로 들어올 시 택시로 이동할 수 밖에 없기 때문에 교통비부담이 있음.
신혼여행 시 완전 강추!!
reviews.positives: 친절, 서비스, 시설

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 좋아요

reviews.title: 로마 최고의 숙소~
reviews.text: 신혼여행 딱 맞는 리조토!~

reviews.title: 너무나도 멋진 호텔입니다
reviews.text: 최고의 호텔 너무나도 멋진 호텔입니다

reviews.title: 최고의 호텔
reviews.text: 말이 필요없는 럭셔리함 그 자체인 호텔입니다/ 묵는 내내 너무나 편안했으며, 힐튼 골드맴버 및 신혼여행임을 어필하여, 로마뷰 업그레이드, 조식, 칵테일구폰, 웰컴 샴페인등 다양한 서비를 받아, 너무나 만족스러운 호텔이었습니다. 위치는 로마 중심부와 많이 떨어져 있지만, 셔틀 및 텍시로 충분히 이동이 가능하였으며, 호텔 자체가 하나의 박물관이었습니다.
reviews.positives: 말이 필요없는 럭셔리함!

reviews.title: 千万不要定特价房

reviews.title: Shocked
reviews.text: In my life I have never seen such treatment. I paid $400 per day. There is no transportation from the airport. There is no breakfast. Use of the swimming pool is for money. Use of the gym is for money. The prices are not good. This will not be repeated.

reviews.title: Майские праздники
reviews.text: Были на майские праздники-цена на этот шикарный отель соответствовала цене отеля в центре Рима. Единственное, что расположен на значительном удалении от центра. Большая территория. номера с антикварной мебелью, отличный завтрак.
reviews.positives: Отличный сервис, шикарные номера, хорошая кухня

reviews.title: Perfect, romantik and luxus
reviews.text:
Den bedste hotel oplevelse vi har haft med en superb spa med La prairie produkter, super venlig personal samt en restaurant af verdensklasse med 3 Michelin Star. 
Vi kan 120 procent rekommandere den hotel for romantik eller famille rejse. 
Det perfekte  destination til ROM.

reviews.title: Relaxing and restorative slice of luxury
reviews.positives: Extremely comfortable beds and a stunning indoor pool that is kid friendly. The sauna/steam spa facility was so relaxing. Our littles even got a cute holiday gift bag. Room service was quick, efficient and delicious. The family room setup was perfect - two rooms with an adjoining foyer that gives you two bathrooms and four beds. I wish we could have stayed longer! Valet was not as exorbitant as other luxury properties we have stayed at, which was a bonus.
reviews.negatives: N/A; this hotel is a bit outside the city center and we didn’t use the shuttle, but others should know there isn’t anything nearby to walk to. It’s in a residential neighborhood.

reviews.title: Great

- Good elevators
- Housekeeping is great service and almost 24h 
- Concierge is helpful especially Miss. Anna and supported us a lot
- Dinning is great
reviews.negatives:
- Very very slow process for check in 
- Delivery fee on room service 
- Every time they charge the credit card without my permission

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Thank you for the wonderful stay and excellent service. We truly appreciated your hospitality and attention to detail. We hope to visit again soon.

reviews.title: One of the best ways to experience Rome.
reviews.positives: The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful. The facilities were also very nice, and the cleanliness was top-notch.
reviews.negatives: The hotel isn’t the best place to explore central Rome, but they do offer a shuttle that goes to and from the center several times a day. The food in the room service was really good, but there was an 8€ charge for each delivery.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The comfort, the cleanliness, the staff all was amazing. Mr. Emre explained us a lot about the city. Appreciated for his help. We would love to come back.

reviews.title: Unforgettable
reviews.positives: The conference:)
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Overpriced and sadly marked as 5 stars
reviews.positives:
The hotel is very beautiful, with nice decorations, spacious room, comfortable linen. The only thing is that the rooms and the whole common areas of the hotel were very cold, seem like the heating was off or not always working. On the ground floor, they had nice atmosphere with live music, but it was also very cold, didn’t feel cozy to stay and relax with the music and a drink. 
The good thing about this hotel is that they have this complimentary food service during the day, so if you feel you need snacks you can have it with a nice view.
The room dining needs to improve, the food is too simple and overpriced, nothing special, a simple one slice of ham and 1 slice of cheese toast was 21 euro, was so sad, I was expecting a bit better food. 
The spa was average in my opinion, there was external guest also coming. Staff was rude. Need to improve this area, few maintenance needed.
The bathroom was good illumination, nice decorated. Unfortunately the water was a bit clogged in our bathroom and it was very smelly when  we’ve arrived. Would be nice if they would clean a bit better or add some fresh perfume. The showers were good, but the glass box needs to be longer to prevent to flood, every time we would shower the water spilled out leaving the bathroom completely wet.
They need to do some small maintenance to improve.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was really upsetting, I was really expecting an “imperial breakfast” as they describe it. Unfortunately not too many options and small simple a la carte. Definitely I had much better breakfast in other hotels. They need to offer toasts options, like avocado toast, different types of eggs fresh, made in time, there was no pancakes, healthy options either. Was more like overall pastries, boiled egg and omelette. I didn’t see the worth so I left. Also the corridors and hall were alsways super cold in winter. The heaters were not on maybe, I saw some hk cleaning some rooms and the balconies were open making the cold air enter to the corridors. There was constructions and a lot of noise in our room, we could basically hear all conversations from our room. Staff were arrogant in restaurant and spa. I had difficulty to communicate with them, most of the staff don’t speak English well enough. The location was pretty far from the city

reviews.negatives: Prices are outrageous at the bar and for rim service. I understand up charging, but it was a bit excessive.  Also, the location is terrible €25 every time we went in town each way.

reviews.title: Luxury in Rome
reviews.positives: The service was exceptional, the rooms spacious and the beds extremely comfortable.  The bathrooms were large and clean, and the view from the balcony was beautiful.  I look forward to staying here again.
reviews.negatives: I ordered a steak medium rare.  I forgot that medium rare in Italy is much rarer than medium rare in the US.  I'll remember next time.
